subject: Welcome to Crescent – Your Start Date is {{date}}
body:
Hi {{employeeName}},

Congratulations! This confirms your assignment with {{client}} as a {{positionTitle}}.

Start Date: {{date}}
Shift: {{shift}}
Report Time: {{reportTime}}
Location: {{facilityAddress}}

Please bring a valid photo ID and arrive 15 minutes early to complete any remaining paperwork. See the facility photo and map below for reference.

If you have any questions before your start date, feel free to reach out.

Welcome aboard!

{{senderName}}
{{senderTitle}}
{{senderCompany}}
{{senderPhone}}
{{senderEmail}}

body:
Hi {{employeeName}},
